label: Arcee Trinity
note: default free model, 100% completion rate, sleepy bias

label: Hunter Alpha
note: best gate accuracy among free API models, noisy bias

label: Healer Alpha
note: no compelling advantage over Hunter or Arcee, sleepy bias

label: Claude Opus 4.6 (subagent)
note: perfect gate detection, isolated subagent pipeline, calibrated

label: Claude Opus 4.6 (manual)
note: expert analysis, highest dimension match (89%), calibrated

label: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (subagent)
note: strong gate detection (F2 0.89), weak dimension calibration (39%), jittery bias

label: Claude Haiku 4.5 (subagent)
note: instruction-following failure — invented own dimensions in 14/18 evals, 1 refusal, 1 cheat. F2 0.08.

label: Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite
note: perfect hard gate recall, fastest model (70s/39 calls), calibrated bias. 2nd place overall.

label: Qwen3 235B
note: perfect hard gate recall, calibrated bias, low personality differentiation (19%). 3rd place.

label: Grok 4.1 Fast
note: solid mid-tier (F2 0.87), noisy bias with errors in both directions. 39/39 completion.

label: DeepSeek v3.2
note: sleepy bias (misses gates), 1 eval failure on graceful_degradation. 17/18 completion.
